notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera plunked

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, shortstop Jim Jarvis to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Jimmy Crooks out at 2nd. Iván Herrera out at 1st.
